theme: Section 1 — 'What a context democracy is': one-line definition + inline network diagram (demo-as-proof)
change_summary: Added homepage Section 1 directly below the hero: a one-line definition of a self-governed context-graph network + an abstract-geometric inline SVG network diagram (new NetworkDiagram.astro) showing six REAL aDNA vaults across categories (SiteForge/forge, III/framework, RareHarness/platform, WGA + Rare Archive/public-good, Home/node) federating as a hexagon ring + spokes around the aDNA hub. Grounding names from data/vaults.json. Removed the superseded 'Who Uses aDNA' persona section (new IA routes audiences via sections; home.ts personas preserved for /use-cases pages); dropped now-unused personas import + orphaned persona/who-uses styles.

doctrine_compliance.section_budget: body sections now hero + sec.1 + How-it-Works + The-Standard = 4 focal (within 5±1); 'Who Uses' cut per delete-the-disposable-section rule
doctrine_compliance.density_band: sec.1 Medium — one definition + one diagram (one idea per screen)
doctrine_compliance.two_colors_max: diagram is monochrome teal (signal) + neutral text; no per-class colors (restraint over the mermaid's multi-color classDefs)
doctrine_compliance.motion_budget: one meaningful motion — the diagram 'composes' (edges draw via stroke-dashoffset, nodes/hub fade-scale, staggered) on first scroll-into-view; JS-armed so no-JS = fully visible; reduced-motion = instant (global rule)
doctrine_compliance.imagery: abstract-geometric inline SVG, no raster, no image-gen (visual-identity-v2 §4/§6); role=img + title/desc a11y
doctrine_compliance.movement_skeptic_guard: the diagram shows REAL named vaults, so the hero's 'network/inheritance' claim is backed immediately
doctrine_compliance.ethos_subtle: threaded by what is shown — WGA + Rare Archive (public-good) among the nodes; caption names 'public-good archives' (shown, not preached)

validation.visual_desktop: dark hero → light sec.1 seam crisp/intentional; hub + 6 labeled nodes + ring/spokes render; caption centered
validation.visual_mobile: 390px — no horizontal scroll (scrollW==clientW==390); diagram legible, labels unclipped; clean seam to How-it-Works
validation.persona_qa: deferred to E1 decadal Reviewer Lens Pass

deploy: deferred to this session's combined deploy after sec.2 (the living registry) lands
notes: Cycle 4 of E1. Polish backlog for the cycle-9 responsive/motion pass: diagram labels are small on narrow phones (legible but minimal) — consider a size bump or simplified mobile layout.
